nasb.text: Now these are those whom David appointed over the service of song in the house of the Lord, after the ark rested there.

esv.text: These are the men whom David put in charge of the service of song in the house of the Lord  after the ark rested there.

cnv.text: 自約櫃安放妥當以後，大衛指派在耶和華殿裡負責歌唱事奉的就是以下這些人。

ccb.text: 约柜安放在耶和华的殿中之后，大卫便派人在那里负责歌乐。
